shots.prompt: The glowing doorway opens and reality reshapes into a melting neon city, glassy skyscrapers bending and dripping like liquid, reflections rippling. Seamless continuation, hypnotic.
The city streets fold and twist into impossible Escher staircases looping back on themselves, neon signs smearing into ribbons of light. Mind-bending morph.
Cars and crowds dissolve into flowing streaks of liquid light coursing through the bending streets, the buildings breathing in and out. Mesmerizing flow.
The entire liquid city folds inward and collapses smoothly into a single rotating neon cube suspended in glittering void. Satisfying geometric morph.
The neon cube unfolds layer by layer like a blooming origami fractal, revealing endless inner structure of glowing geometry. Hypnotic unfolding.
The unfolding geometry softens into swaying luminous tendrils, the first glowing vines of a strange forest beginning to grow. Smooth transition into the next realm.
